creator: akosela@andykosela.com
text:
- Update to 2.1.1

 * bug fix release

Generated with FreeBSD Port Tools 0.99

Fix: 

--
Andy Kosela
akosela@andykosela.com--J03vGdvIB1RS4uFkHuU53XdWB21Z1JEEOJtVwXGV8xiz9gpm
Content-Type: text/plain; name="bpkg-2.1.1.patch"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="bpkg-2.1.1.patch"

diff -ruN --exclude=CVS /usr/ports/ports-mgmt/bpkg/Makefile /usr/home/akosela/bpkg/Makefile
--- /usr/ports/ports-mgmt/bpkg/Makefile	2010-09-15 14:02:13.000000000 +0200
+++ /usr/home/akosela/bpkg/Makefile	2010-09-18 14:27:35.000000000 +0200
@@ -2,13 +2,13 @@
 # Date created:				24 June 2007
 # Whom:					Andy Kosela <akosela@andykosela.com>
 #
-# $FreeBSD: ports/ports-mgmt/bpkg/Makefile,v 1.26 2010/09/15 08:41:55 bapt Exp $
+# $FreeBSD$
 #
 # This port is self contained in the files directory.
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	bpkg
-PORTVERSION=	2.1
+PORTVERSION=	2.1.1
 CATEGORIES=	ports-mgmt
 MASTER_SITES=	# none
 DISTFILES=	# none
diff -ruN --exclude=CVS /usr/ports/ports-mgmt/bpkg/files/bpkg.sh.in /usr/home/akosela/bpkg/files/bpkg.sh.in
--- /usr/ports/ports-mgmt/bpkg/files/bpkg.sh.in	2010-09-15 14:02:13.000000000 +0200
+++ /usr/home/akosela/bpkg/files/bpkg.sh.in	2010-09-18 14:25:11.000000000 +0200
@@ -1,5 +1,5 @@
 #!/bin/sh
-# $FreeBSD: ports/ports-mgmt/bpkg/files/bpkg.sh.in,v 1.25 2010/09/15 08:41:55 bapt Exp $
+# $FreeBSD$
 
 #  Copyright (c) 2007-2010 Andy Kosela <akosela@andykosela.com>
 #  All rights reserved.
@@ -66,7 +66,7 @@
 
 info_fn()
 {
-	info=`pkg_info | grep $e | cut -d' ' -f1`
+	info=`pkg_info | cut -d' ' -f1 | grep $e`
 }
 
 ########################################################################
